properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I’ve come a long way, I’ve had fears and doubts, But in Your mind Lord, You knew I couldn’t live with them; So You chose at this time, To wave before me The thing You knew would make me Give up myself and my thoughts. It could never have worked by my own works, But of faith that it might be by grace; To the end the promise might be sure to all the seed, Unto us, of the faith of Abraham.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I’m now looking for the promise of my new body, As my earth quakes all my sin is shaken off; The Holy Fire from above puts sin out of existence, For Holiness cannot dwell in sinful earth.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: But while I am here living in this world, I live by the faith of the Son of God revealed in me; To believe His word and claim what’s my own, By promise it was freely given to me, And when it seems that there’s no hope, believe in hope, And consider not the things which my eyes see; But look into the Word of God That shall not pass away, And its righteousness which is by faith.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I’m living in the day When my desert is blossoming like a rose, I’m living in the day, When my thorns are unfolding to leaves again, True fellowship is being restored It’s the promise of the Lord; I’m looking now for the promise of my change, I’m looking now for the promise of my new body; I’m looking now for the promise of my change.
